summary: Iran ceasefire optimism lifted equities Tuesday but oil held above $100, keeping the relief fragile. A jobs data gauntlet now takes center stage, with ADP today and March nonfarm payrolls Friday — after February shed 92,000 jobs, another miss would sharpen recession fears at a precarious moment for risk assets.
tweet: Iran ceasefire hopes bounced stocks, but oil above $100 and a brutal jobs week keep the rally on thin ice.
